schema_notes: Closes the v2 scope deferred from PR #98 (which shipped 18 root-level files).
Bundle keyed by relative path under specific_skill_stat_descriptions/ - keeps per-skill organization but consumers only need a single file load.
English-only templates. Each per_skill[rel] is a {descriptions, no_descriptions, source_relpath, ...} dict matching the v1 per-file shape.
Variant range tokens: '#' = default/any, '1' = exact value 1, '10' = exact 10, '1|#' = [1, inf], '#|0' = [-inf, 0], '1|99' = [1, 99].
data_policy: Sourced exclusively from the maintainer's licensed PoE2 install via the in-repo extraction pipeline. No third-party wiki / scraped data.
